name: Purchase Order
description: Extract PO details, line items, and terms from purchase orders.
instructions:
Extract the following fields:

- po_number (string)
- po_date (date)
- buyer_company (string)
- buyer_address (string)
- supplier_company (string)
- supplier_address (string)
- delivery_date_requested (date)
- currency (string)
- subtotal (number)
- tax_amount (number)
- total_amount (number)
- payment_terms (string)
- delivery_terms (string)
- notes (string)
- line_items (array): each item has description, quantity, unit_price, total

Mark fields not present in the document as null.
